allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('province/bologna.html','utf8'\); const i=t.indexOf\('</head>'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t.slice\(i, i+100\)\)\);")

PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; "Killed PID $pid" } else { "No process on 8080" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "No process on 8080" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Port 8080 is free" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed $proc" } else { "free" })
